Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); posts=d.get\('influencers',[]\); from collections import Counter; print\('total:',len\(posts\)\); print\('by source:', Counter\(p['source'] for p in posts\)\); print\('sample yt:', [p.get\('handle'\) for p in posts if p.get\('source'\)=='youtube'][:5]\)")
